title: xiigen.i18n-translation.request-registered.v1
description: Emitted by T665 TranslationRequestRegistrar when a new locale is detected from a user registration and either stored in xiigen-translation-requests or enrolled in i18n.enabledLocales.

tenantId.description: Tenant that owns this translation request (ALS).

userId.description: For user_registration source — the user who triggered detection.

enabledLocalesExpanded.description: True when this call also mutated freedom_config['i18n.enabledLocales'].
